instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। अपना answer लिखें, फिर 'Reveal Answer' button दबाएं।

questions.hindi: मेरा नाम रोहन है।
questions.english: My name is Rohan.
questions.explanation: नाम बताने का सबसे common तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं दिल्ली से हूँ।
questions.english: I am from Delhi.
questions.explanation: Origin बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं एक software engineer के रूप में काम करता हूँ।
questions.english: I work as a software engineer.
questions.explanation: Profession बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरे परिवार में पाँच लोग हैं।
questions.english: There are five people in my family.
questions.hint: There are + number + people in my family
questions.explanation: Family size बताने का common pattern।
questions.grammarRule: There are + [number] + people in my family

questions.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना पसंद है।
questions.english: I like reading books.
questions.explanation: Hobby बताने का pattern, verb+ing ज़रूरी है।

questions.hindi: आपसे मिलकर खुशी हुई।
questions.english: Nice to meet you.
questions.explanation: पहली बार मिलने पर common greeting।

questions.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I have been working here for two years.
alternatives: I have worked here for two years.
questions.hint: I have been + verb+ing + for + time
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous experience बताने के लिए।

questions.hindi: मैं एक middle-class family से हूँ।
questions.english: I come from a middle-class family.
alternatives: I belong to a middle-class family.
questions.explanation: Family background बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरा एक बड़ा भाई है।
questions.english: I have one elder brother.
questions.explanation: Sibling बताने का common pattern।

questions.hindi: मैं final year का student हूँ।
questions.english: I am a final year student.
questions.explanation: Student status बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मुझे photography का शौक है।
questions.english: I am passionate about photography.
questions.explanation: Passion बताने का professional तरीका।

questions.hindi: क्या मैं आपका नाम जान सकता हूँ?
questions.english: May I know your name, please?
alternatives: Could you tell me your name?
questions.explanation: Politely किसी का नाम पूछने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं छह महीने से English सीख रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I have been learning English for six months.
alternatives: I've been learning English for six months.
questions.hint: I have been + verb+ing + for + time
questions.explanation: Ongoing action जो अभी भी चल रहा है।

questions.hindi: आप क्या काम करते हैं?
questions.english: What do you do for a living?
questions.explanation: Profession पूछने का common सवाल।
questions.grammarRule: What do you do (for a living)?

questions.hindi: मेरा जन्म मुंबई में हुआ पर मैं पुणे में बड़ा हुआ।
questions.english: I was born in Mumbai but raised in Pune.
alternatives: I was born in Mumbai and grew up in Pune.
questions.hint: I was born in + city + but raised in + city
questions.explanation: Passive voice से birthplace और upbringing दोनों बताना।
questions.grammarRule: I was born in + [place] but raised in + [place]

questions.hindi: मैं अपना खुद का business चलाता हूँ।
questions.english: I run my own business.
questions.explanation: Business owner बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं तीन साल से computer science पढ़ रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I have been studying computer science for three years.
alternatives: I've studied computer science for three years.
questions.hint: I have been + verb+ing + for + time
questions.explanation: लंबे समय से चलने वाला काम बताने के लिए।

questions.hindi: मेरा बड़ा परिवार है।
questions.english: I have a big family.
questions.explanation: Family size describe करने का simple तरीका।

questions.hindi: मुझे नई भाषाएँ सीखने में रुचि है।
questions.english: I am interested in learning new languages.
questions.explanation: Interest बताने के लिए gerund pattern।

questions.hindi: मैं अभी बेंगलुरु में रहता हूँ।
questions.english: I currently live in Bangalore.
questions.explanation: 'currently' present situation बताता है।

questions.hindi: मेरा profession से मैं एक teacher हूँ।
questions.english: I am a teacher by profession.
questions.explanation: Profession को formally बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मुझे लोग विक्की बुलाते हैं।
questions.english: People call me Vicky.
questions.explanation: Nickname बताने के लिए common structure।

questions.hindi: आप मुझे राज बुला सकते हैं।
questions.english: You can call me Raj.
questions.explanation: किसी को अपना short nickname बताने का polite तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं बिहार के एक छोटे शहर से आता हूँ।
questions.english: I come from a small town in Bihar.
alternatives: I belong to a small town in Bihar.
questions.hint: I come from a + [adjective] + town in + [state]
questions.explanation: Detailed origin बताने का तरीका।
questions.grammarRule: I come from a + [adjective] town in + [state]

questions.hindi: मुझे भी आपसे मिलकर खुशी हुई।
questions.english: Pleased to meet you too.
questions.explanation: Greeting का जवाब देने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरे परिवार में मेरे माता-पिता और मैं हूँ।
questions.english: My family consists of my parents and me.
alternatives: It's just me and my parents.
questions.explanation: 'consist of' formal structure family describe करने के लिए।

questions.hindi: मैं cricket खेलना बहुत पसंद करता हूँ।
questions.english: I love playing cricket.
questions.explanation: Strong liking बताने के लिए 'love' + gerund।

questions.hindi: मैं weekend पर movies देखना पसंद करता हूँ।
questions.english: I enjoy watching movies on weekends.
alternatives: I like watching movies on weekends.
questions.explanation: Weekly habit के साथ hobby बताना।

questions.hindi: मैं एक joint family से आता हूँ।
questions.english: I come from a joint family.
alternatives: I belong to a joint family.
questions.hint: I come from a + [type of] family
questions.explanation: Family type बताने का Indian English structure।

questions.hindi: मैं अभी एक IT company में काम कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I am currently working at an IT company.
alternatives: I currently work for an IT company.
questions.hint: I am currently working at + [company type]
questions.explanation: Present Continuous से वर्तमान job बताना।

questions.hindi: मैं अध्ययन के दौरान बहुत सक्रिय रहा।
questions.english: I was very active during my studies.
alternatives: I stayed very active throughout my studies.
questions.explanation: Past tense से academic life describe करना।

questions.hindi: मैं दिल्ली विश्वविद्यालय से 2022 में स्नातक हुआ।
questions.english: I graduated from Delhi University in 2022.
alternatives: I completed my graduation from Delhi University in 2022.
questions.explanation: Education background बताने का common पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मैं एक IT company में प्रशिक्षु के रूप में काम कर चुका हूँ।
questions.english: I have completed an internship at an IT company.
alternatives: I did an internship at an IT company.
questions.hint: I have completed an internship at + [place]
questions.explanation: Experience बताने का Present Perfect पैटर्न।
questions.grammarRule: I have completed an internship at + [place]

questions.hindi: मेरी सबसे बड़ी शक्ति communication है।
questions.english: My biggest strength is communication.
questions.explanation: Interview में strength बताने का common पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मेरी कमजोरी यह है कि मैं perfectionist हूँ।
questions.english: My weakness is that I am a perfectionist.
alternatives: I would say my weakness is being a perfectionist.
questions.explanation: Interview में weakness को positively बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं एक टीम खिलाड़ी हूँ।
questions.english: I consider myself a good team player.
alternatives: I am a great team player.
questions.explanation: Self-description का professional तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं किसी भी काम के वातावरण में अनुकूल हो सकता हूँ।
questions.english: I am adaptable to any work environment.
alternatives: I can adapt to any work environment.
questions.explanation: Flexibility बताने का professional तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरा career लक्ष्य team lead बनना है।
questions.english: My career goal is to become a team lead.
alternatives: I aspire to become a team lead.
questions.hint: My career goal is to + [base verb]
questions.explanation: Career aspirations बताने का पैटर्न।
questions.grammarRule: My career goal is to + [base verb]

questions.hindi: मैं इस कंपनी में विकसित होना चाहता हूँ।
questions.english: I aspire to grow within this company.
alternatives: I want to grow within this company.
questions.explanation: 'aspire to' formal aspiration बताने के लिए।

questions.hindi: मैं हिंदी और अंग्रेजी दोनों में धाराप्रवाह हूँ।
questions.english: I am fluent in both Hindi and English.
alternatives: I speak both Hindi and English fluently.
questions.explanation: Language skill बताने का structure।

questions.hindi: मैं आपसे इस अवसर के लिए उत्सुक हूँ।
questions.english: I am looking forward to this opportunity.
alternatives: I am excited about this opportunity.
questions.explanation: Interview खत्म करने का positive तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरे पास relevant अनुभव है इस role के लिए।
questions.english: I have relevant experience for this role.
questions.explanation: Experience को role से जोड़ने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं समय का पालन करने में बहुत अच्छा हूँ।
questions.english: I am very punctual and disciplined.
alternatives: I am always on time and disciplined.
questions.explanation: Personal qualities को जोड़ी में बताना।

questions.hindi: मेरा personality outgoing और friendly है।
questions.english: I have an outgoing and friendly personality.
alternatives: I am an outgoing and friendly person.
questions.explanation: Personality describe करने का common पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मैं अनजान लोगों के साथ थोड़ा संकोची हूँ।
questions.english: I am a bit reserved with strangers.
alternatives: I am somewhat shy with new people.
questions.explanation: Honestly personality trait बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरे पिता मेरा role model हैं।
questions.english: My father is my role model.
alternatives: I look up to my father as my role model.
questions.explanation: Inspiration बताने का common पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मैं graphic design में स्वयं सीखा हुआ हूँ।
questions.english: I am self-taught in graphic design.
alternatives: I learned graphic design on my own.
questions.explanation: Self-learning बताने का common पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मैं digital marketing में विशेषज्ञता रखता हूँ।
questions.english: I specialize in digital marketing.
questions.explanation: Specialization बताने का professional तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं अभी MBA कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I am pursuing an MBA currently.
alternatives: I am currently doing an MBA.
questions.explanation: Ongoing education बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: मेरी मातृभाषा हिंदी है।
questions.english: My mother tongue is Hindi.
questions.explanation: पहली भाषा बताने का सरल तरीका।

questions.hindi: मैं keralaका मूल निवासी हूँ।
questions.english: I am a native of Kerala.
questions.explanation: Native place बताने का formal तरीका।

questions.hindi: मुझे संगीत सुनना पसंद है।
questions.english: I enjoy listening to music.
questions.explanation: 'listen to music' एक common expression है।

questions.hindi: मेरा सपना एक successful entrepreneur बनना है।
questions.english: My dream is to become a successful entrepreneur.
alternatives: I dream of becoming a successful entrepreneur.
questions.explanation: Aspiration बताने का common structure।

questions.hindi: मैं problem-solving में अच्छा हूँ।
questions.english: I am good at problem-solving.
alternatives: Problem-solving is one of my strengths.
questions.explanation: Skill बताने का common structure।

questions.hindi: मैं नए लोगों से मिलना पसंद करता हूँ।
questions.english: I enjoy meeting new people.
questions.explanation: Social hobby बताने का पैटर्न।

questions.hindi: मेरा शौक photography और traveling है।
questions.english: My hobbies are photography and traveling.
questions.explanation: Multiple hobbies बताने का तरीका।

questions.hindi: क्या आप मुझे अपने बारे में बता सकते हैं?
questions.english: Can you tell me about yourself?
questions.explanation: Interview का सबसे common opening सवाल।

questions.hindi: आज मेरे साथ जुड़ने के लिए धन्यवाद।
questions.english: Thank you for joining me today.
questions.explanation: Meeting शुरू करने का polite तरीका।

questions.hindi: मुझे आशा है कि हम अच्छे से काम कर पाएंगे।
questions.english: I hope we can work well together.
alternatives: I look forward to working with you.
questions.explanation: Introduction समाप्त करने का positive तरीका।

questions.hindi: आपसे बात करके अच्छा लगा।
questions.english: It was nice talking to you.
alternatives: It was great speaking with you.
questions.explanation: बातचीत खत्म करने का polite तरीका।
